faqs.question: How much does clothes moth control cost in North Bergen, NJ?
faqs.answer: Clothes moth control in North Bergen typically ranges from $550 to $5,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, the size of your property, and the number of treatments required. Single-room treatments start around $550, while whole-home infestations in larger properties may reach $5,000. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have a clothes moth infestation in my North Bergen home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include small holes in woolens, cashmere, or natural fiber clothing, silky tubes or webbing in closets, carpet damage in dark corners, and small beige or gold-colored moths flying near wardrobes. You may also notice larvae (small caterpillars) on fabric surfaces or shed casings in storage areas. If you spot any of these signs in your North Bergen home, contact us immediately for an inspection.

faqs.question: Are clothes moth treatments safe for my family and pets in North Bergen?
faqs.answer: Yes, we prioritize safety by using EPA-approved products and targeted application methods that minimize exposure to people and pets. Our technicians focus treatments on infested areas like closets, storage spaces, and carpeting while following strict safety protocols. We provide clear instructions on any necessary precautions and re-entry times, typically allowing you to remain safely in your home during and after treatment.
